questions.stem: —______ you ______ your homework yet? —Yes, I ______ it an hour ago.
questions.explanation: 【解析】第一空：yet（已经/还）是现在完成时的标志词，用于疑问句和否定句，结构为Have/Has+主语+done，故用Have; finished。第二空：an hour ago（一小时前）是一般过去时的标志词，表示过去某个时间点发生的动作，故用finished。【技巧】时态标志词记忆口诀：yet/already/ever/never/since/for用现完；yesterday/last week/ago用过去。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The boy ______ is playing basketball over there is my classmate.
questions.explanation: 【解析】本题考查定语从句关系词。先行词The boy指人，且在定语从句______ is playing basketball中作主语，故用who。B选项which指物；C选项whom指人但作宾语；D选项whose表示所属关系（……的）。【技巧】定语从句关系词选择：指人主语用who，指人宾语用whom/who，指物用which/that，表示所属用whose。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The book ______ by many students in our class every day.
questions.explanation: 【解析】every day（每天）表示一般现在时，主语The book与read之间是被动关系（书被读），故用一般现在时的被动语态is read。B选项是主动语态；C选项是过去时被动，与every day时间不符；D选项是现在分词，不能作谓语。【技巧】被动语态结构：be+过去分词，时态体现在be动词上（am/is/are/was/were）。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: I ______ the book twice, but I ______ it to the library yesterday afternoon.
questions.explanation: 【解析】第一空：twice（两次）表示动作发生的次数，是经历，用现在完成时have read；第二空：yesterday afternoon（昨天下午）是明确的过去时间状语，用一般过去时returned。【技巧】现在完成时强调"经历/影响/持续"，一般过去时强调"过去某时发生的动作"。有具体过去时间（yesterday/last year/ago）必须用一般过去时。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: It's ______ to walk in the park on such a sunny and warm day.
questions.explanation: 【解析】根据语境sunny and warm day（晴朗温暖的日子），在公园散步应该是"愉快的"。pleasant意为"令人愉快的"；boring（无聊的）、terrible（糟糕的）、difficult（困难的）均与语境不符。【技巧】语境猜词法：根据上下文描述的积极场景选择积极词汇。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: As students, we should ______ our best to protect the environment.
questions.explanation: 【解析】固定搭配try one's best to do sth.意为"尽某人最大努力做某事"。其他选项：make one's way（前进），do one's homework（做作业），take one's time（慢慢来），均不符合语境。【技巧】积累常见动词短语：try one's best, do one's best（也可表示尽力，但本题选项有try优先选try）。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: The ______ of this school activity is to raise students' awareness of environmental protection.
questions.explanation: 【解析】purpose意为"目的"，与后面的to raise...（为了提高……）构成逻辑搭配，表示活动的目的。opinion（观点）、result（结果）、method（方法）均不符合句意。【技巧】注意名词与后置定语的搭配：the purpose of...is to do...（……的目的是为了……）。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized an interesting activity called "Green School Week". The aim was to help students understand the importance of environmental protection.

During the week, we were asked to do several things. First, we needed to bring our own water bottles (8) of buying plastic ones. Second, we had to collect waste paper and bottles for recycling. Many students found it (9) to take part in these activities.

On the last day, our class held a sharing meeting. We talked about (10) we had learned from the activity. Some students said they realized how serious the pollution problem was. Others (11) to keep doing green things in daily life.

The activity not only taught us knowledge about the environment, but also helped us develop good habits. I believe small actions can make a big (12) to our world.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查固定搭配instead of（代替，而不是）。句意：我们需要带自己的水瓶，而不是购买塑料瓶。instead of是介词短语，后接动名词buying符合语法。其他选项：because of（因为），ahead of（在……之前），out of（出于/在……外）。【技巧】完形填空注意固定搭配，instead of是中考高频考点，表示对比转折关系。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized an interesting activity called "Green School Week". The aim was to help students understand the importance of environmental protection.

During the week, we were asked to do several things. First, we needed to bring our own water bottles (8) of buying plastic ones. Second, we had to collect waste paper and bottles for recycling. Many students found it (9) to take part in these activities.

On the last day, our class held a sharing meeting. We talked about (10) we had learned from the activity. Some students said they realized how serious the pollution problem was. Others (11) to keep doing green things in daily life.

The activity not only taught us knowledge about the environment, but also helped us develop good habits. I believe small actions can make a big (12) to our world.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查语境推理。前文提到活动目的是帮助学生理解环保的重要性，且学生参与了回收等活动，因此应该是觉得"有意义的"（meaningful）。boring（无聊的）、useless（无用的）与文章积极基调不符；difficult（困难的）在下文没有体现。【技巧】完形填空要把握全文情感基调，本文是积极正面的环保活动，应选褒义词。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized an interesting activity called "Green School Week". The aim was to help students understand the importance of environmental protection.

During the week, we were asked to do several things. First, we needed to bring our own water bottles (8) of buying plastic ones. Second, we had to collect waste paper and bottles for recycling. Many students found it (9) to take part in these activities.

On the last day, our class held a sharing meeting. We talked about (10) we had learned from the activity. Some students said they realized how serious the pollution problem was. Others (11) to keep doing green things in daily life.

The activity not only taught us knowledge about the environment, but also helped us develop good habits. I believe small actions can make a big (12) to our world.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查宾语从句连接词。空格处引导宾语从句作talked about的宾语，且在从句中作learned的宾语（学到的东西），故用what。that在宾语从句中不充当成分；which表示"哪一个"（有选择范围）；where作地点状语。【技巧】宾语从句缺主语/宾语/表语时用what；缺地点状语用where；不缺成分用that；是否用if/whether。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized an interesting activity called "Green School Week". The aim was to help students understand the importance of environmental protection.

During the week, we were asked to do several things. First, we needed to bring our own water bottles (8) of buying plastic ones. Second, we had to collect waste paper and bottles for recycling. Many students found it (9) to take part in these activities.

On the last day, our class held a sharing meeting. We talked about (10) we had learned from the activity. Some students said they realized how serious the pollution problem was. Others (11) to keep doing green things in daily life.

The activity not only taught us knowledge about the environment, but also helped us develop good habits. I believe small actions can make a big (12) to our world.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查语境推理。前文提到学生们意识到污染问题的严重性，因此其他人"承诺"（promised）在日常生活中继续做环保事情符合逻辑。hope to do（希望做）虽语法正确，但promise更能体现决心；refused（拒绝）和forgot（忘记）与语境相反。【技巧】注意上下文逻辑关系，前文"realized how serious"提示后文应该是积极行动。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school organized an interesting activity called "Green School Week". The aim was to help students understand the importance of environmental protection.

During the week, we were asked to do several things. First, we needed to bring our own water bottles (8) of buying plastic ones. Second, we had to collect waste paper and bottles for recycling. Many students found it (9) to take part in these activities.

On the last day, our class held a sharing meeting. We talked about (10) we had learned from the activity. Some students said they realized how serious the pollution problem was. Others (11) to keep doing green things in daily life.

The activity not only taught us knowledge about the environment, but also helped us develop good habits. I believe small actions can make a big (12) to our world.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查固定搭配make a difference（产生影响，有所作为）。句意：我相信小小的行动可以给我们的世界带来很大影响。其他选项：make a problem（制造问题），make a decision（做决定），make a plan（制定计划），均不符合语境。【技巧】积累中考高频短语make a difference，常考搭配为make a difference to...（对……产生影响）。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.stem: What will the smart pot do when the soil becomes too dry?
options: A. Send a message to the user's phone.
B. Add water to the soil by itself.
C. Show the temperature on the screen.
D. Connect to the smartphone immediately.
questions.group_passage:
Do you often forget to water your plants when you go on vacation? A new smart pot might solve this problem for you.

This special pot, invented by a group of high school students in Shenzhen, can take care of plants automatically. It has sensors (传感器) that can check the soil condition. When the soil becomes too dry, the pot will add water by itself. It also has a small screen to show how your plant is doing.

What's more, the pot can connect to your smartphone through an app. Even when you are far away from home, you can still know if your plants need help. The app will send you messages about the temperature, light, and water level.

The inventors said they created this product because they noticed many people love plants but don't have enough time to care for them. "We hope our smart pot can help more people enjoy gardening without worry," said Li Ming, the team leader.

The smart pot has won several awards in science competitions. It will be available in the market next year at a price of about 200 yuan.
questions.explanation: 【解析】细节理解题。根据第二段第四句"When the soil becomes too dry, the pot will add water by itself."（当土壤变得太干时，花盆会自动加水。）可知答案为B。A选项是手机App的功能；C选项屏幕显示的是植物状况而非温度；D选项连接手机是持续状态，不是在土壤干时发生的动作。【技巧】细节题要准确定位原文，注意题干关键词soil becomes dry对应原文原句。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解

questions.stem: The underlined word "available" in the last paragraph probably means ______.
questions.explanation: 【解析】词义猜测题。根据最后一段"It will be available in the market next year at a price of about 200 yuan."（它将于明年在市场上available，价格约200元。）可知，available指"可获得的，可买到的"，即ready for use/purchase（可供使用/购买）。A选项（容易找到）不准确；C选项（昂贵）与词义无关；D选项（流行）是available之后可能产生的结果而非词义本身。【技巧】词义猜测题根据上下文逻辑，产品发明后进入市场供人购买，即"可供使用的"。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测

questions.stem: What can we learn from the passage?
options: A. The smart pot is too expensive for students.
B. Li Ming invented the smart pot all by himself.
C. The smart pot can only be used in Shenzhen.
D. The inventors created the product based on people's needs.
questions.explanation: 【解析】推理判断题。根据第四段第一句"The inventors said they created this product because they noticed many people love plants but don't have enough time to care for them."（发明者说他们创造这个产品是因为他们注意到很多人喜欢植物但没有足够时间照顾。）可推断出，发明者是根据人们的需求创造产品的，故选D。A选项200元是否太贵文中未评价；B选项与第一段"a group of high school students"（一群学生）矛盾；C选项文中未提及地域限制。【技巧】推理题要基于原文信息进行合理推断，不能过度推断或选择文中未提及的信息。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断

questions.stem: What is the best title for the passage?
options: A. How to Water Plants Properly
B. High School Students in Shenzhen
C. A Smart Pot for Plant Lovers
D. Gardening as a Popular Hobby
questions.explanation: 【解析】主旨大意题。全文围绕"智能花盆"（smart pot）展开，介绍其功能、发明背景、发明者意图等。A选项（如何正确浇水）只是引出问题的一个细节；B选项（深圳高中生）只是发明者身份；D选项（园艺作为流行爱好）是背景信息。C选项（为植物爱好者设计的智能花盆）最能概括全文主旨。【技巧】主旨题/标题题要抓住全文核心话题，通常是反复出现的关键词（本文是smart pot），并涵盖文章主要内容。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意

options: A. However, it's not impossible to solve this problem.
B. This helps you see how much free time you actually have.
C. For example, finish your homework first.
D. Everyone has their own way of balancing things.
E. In addition, you can ask teachers for help.
questions.group_passage:
Many students have trouble balancing their schoolwork and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they can't find enough time for both. (17) ______ Here are some useful tips.

First, make a schedule. Write down all your tasks and activities for the week. (18) ______ This way, you won't forget important things.

Second, learn to focus. When you study, put away your phone and other distractions. (19) ______ Then you can enjoy your hobbies without worry.

Finally, remember that quality matters more than quantity. It's better to spend one hour fully enjoying your hobby than three hours worrying about homework while doing it. (20) ______ Just try your best and find what works for you.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查段落衔接与逻辑关系。前文说"很多学生难以平衡学业和爱好，感到压力"，后文说"这里有一些有用的建议"，因此中间需要转折过渡，表示"然而，解决这个问题并非不可能"。However表示转折，承上启下引出解决方案。【技巧】选句填空要注意空格前后的逻辑关系，前文讲问题，后文讲解决方法，中间用转折词However过渡。
questions.label: 短文填空

options: A. However, it's not impossible to solve this problem.
B. This helps you see how much free time you actually have.
C. For example, finish your homework first.
D. Everyone has their own way of balancing things.
E. In addition, you can ask teachers for help.
questions.group_passage:
Many students have trouble balancing their schoolwork and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they can't find enough time for both. (17) ______ Here are some useful tips.

First, make a schedule. Write down all your tasks and activities for the week. (18) ______ This way, you won't forget important things.

Second, learn to focus. When you study, put away your phone and other distractions. (19) ______ Then you can enjoy your hobbies without worry.

Finally, remember that quality matters more than quantity. It's better to spend one hour fully enjoying your hobby than three hours worrying about homework while doing it. (20) ______ Just try your best and find what works for you.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查指代关系与逻辑衔接。前文说"制定时间表，写下所有任务和活动"，后文说"这样你就不会忘记重要的事情"，因此空格处应解释制定时间表的好处。This指代前文"制定时间表并写下任务"这件事，说明这样做能帮助你看到实际有多少空闲时间。【技巧】注意代词指代，This helps...中的This通常指代前文提到的做法。
questions.label: 短文填空

options: A. However, it's not impossible to solve this problem.
B. This helps you see how much free time you actually have.
C. For example, finish your homework first.
C. For example, finish your homework first.
E. In addition, you can ask teachers for help.
questions.group_passage:
Many students have trouble balancing their schoolwork and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they can't find enough time for both. (17) ______ Here are some useful tips.

First, make a schedule. Write down all your tasks and activities for the week. (18) ______ This way, you won't forget important things.

Second, learn to focus. When you study, put away your phone and other distractions. (19) ______ Then you can enjoy your hobbies without worry.

Finally, remember that quality matters more than quantity. It's better to spend one hour fully enjoying your hobby than three hours worrying about homework while doing it. (20) ______ Just try your best and find what works for you.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查举例说明与逻辑顺序。本段主题是learn to focus（学会专注）并远离干扰，后文说"然后你可以无忧无虑地享受爱好"，因此空格处应该是具体的建议——先完成作业。For example引出具体例子，finish your homework first与enjoy your hobbies形成先后逻辑关系。【技巧】注意逻辑顺序词Then（然后），提示前文应该有"先……"的动作。
questions.label: 短文填空

options: A. However, it's not impossible to solve this problem.
B. This helps you see how much free time you actually have.
C. For example, finish your homework first.
D. Everyone has their own way of balancing things.
E. In addition, you can ask teachers for help.
questions.group_passage:
Many students have trouble balancing their schoolwork and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they can't find enough time for both. (17) ______ Here are some useful tips.

First, make a schedule. Write down all your tasks and activities for the week. (18) ______ This way, you won't forget important things.

Second, learn to focus. When you study, put away your phone and other distractions. (19) ______ Then you can enjoy your hobbies without worry.

Finally, remember that quality matters more than quantity. It's better to spend one hour fully enjoying your hobby than three hours worrying about homework while doing it. (20) ______ Just try your best and find what works for you.
questions.explanation: 【解析】考查总结归纳。前文讲平衡学业和爱好的方法，后文说"尽你最大努力找到适合你的方法"，因此空格处应表示"每个人都有自己的平衡方式"。Everyone has their own way...与后文find what works for you（找到适合你的）形成呼应。【技巧】选句填空注意首尾呼应，后文的find what works for you暗示前文应提到"每个人方式不同"。
questions.label: 短文填空
